added: Agent-to-agent chat with human intervention controls.
Portable config bundles for moving Mission Control between machines.
improved: Dashboard widgets can now be rearranged and hidden per workspace.
Command palette coverage expanded across more operational surfaces.
fixed: Settings persistence is more resilient when bootstrapping from seed data.

added: Knowledge Base for local file indexing and private semantic search.
Extensions page with marketplace, upload scanner, and developer mode.
improved: Replay sessions now include richer timeline context and file diffs.
Prompt Library gained versions, import/export, and agent handoff flows.
fixed: Plugin parsing is more consistent across OpenClaw outputs.

added: Cost Dashboard with budgets, charts, and per-session tracking.
Scheduled Tasks with cron helpers, run history, and manual execution.
improved: Notifications now surface schedule runs and budget alerts more clearly.
Team dashboards and reports gained stronger seeded demo coverage.
fixed: Analytics fallbacks now populate correctly when provider breakdowns are sparse.

added: Mission Control desktop dashboard for OpenClaw operations.
Live activities, agent sessions, cost visibility, and connection management.
improved: Core dark glass UI and workspace navigation baseline.
fixed: Initial release stabilization for local configuration and demo states.
